task: Advanced high-value task: Slo Burn-Rate Window Remediation Sequencing Note. Scenario: an expert team is preparing a launch or release decision and needs a calculation-backed recommendation for slo burn-rate window. Embedded packet: Records: R1 error_count=48 request_count=78 window_minutes=7; R2 error_count=57 request_count=74 window_minutes=10; R3 error_count=43 request_count=89 window_minutes=6. Remediation options: O1 changes error_count by -12% cost=80000; O2 changes request_count by -18% cost=97200; O3 changes window_minutes by -25% cost=56800; max_budget=122400. Rules and constraints: burn_rate=(error_rate)/(1-SLO); page when short and long windows exceed policy; missing values cannot be imputed and all calculations must use only the embedded packet. Required work: calculate all derived metrics, classify each record, and explain the smallest set of values that determines the recommendation. Deliver SLO_burn_3.xlsx + expert_memo.md with formulas, intermediate values, row-level citations, explicit assumptions, sensitivity checks, and a final recommendation table. Do not invent inputs; mark ambiguous items as needs_review.
